Petition To Set Aside Trust On The Grounds Of Undue Influence, Fraud, And/Or Undue Profit; Tortious Interference With Right To Inherit; Breach Of Fidu
Off Calendar Jun-06-2012 Continued To Jul-18-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jannik Catalano for Janice Belen. Dawson Crawford for Sylvia Thomason.

Counsel advised the Court that the matter settled and requested that they be allowed to file an ex parte petition for approval of the settlement agreement. The Court will allow filing of said ex parte petition. The Petition to Set Aside Trust On The Grounds of Undue Influence, ect. was continued to July 18, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Accounting
Off Calendar May-09-2012 Continued To Jun-06-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jannik Catalano for Janice Belen (Respondent) and specially appearing for Attorney Dawson Crawford.

Mr. Catalano stated that the accounting was almost complete and that he plans to file it by the end of this week (Friday). Status on the accouting and the Petition to Set Aside Trust, etc. was continued to June 6, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of the accounting and for status of mediation. Mr. Catalano will advise Mr. Crawford of the next hearing date.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

Petition To Set Aside Trust On The Grounds Of Undue Influence, Fraud, And/Or Undue Profit; Tortious Interference With Right To Inherit; Breach Of Fidu
Off Calendar May-09-2012 Continued To Jun-06-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Compelling Report And Accounting [Probate Code Sections 17200(B)(7), 16064(A)]
Off Calendar Apr-03-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dawson Crawford for Sylvia Thomason. Jannik Catalano for Respondent.

Counsel reported that mediation is sheduled for May 18, 2012, that both sides have conducted extensive discovery and that Mr. Catalano agreed to do the accounting. The Court granted the Petition Compelling an Accounting (subject to receipt and review of the order). Mr. Crawford is to prepare said order. Status on the accounting was set for May 9, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Petition to Set Aside Trust On The Grounds Of Undue Influence, etc. was also continued to May 9, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

Petition To Set Aside Trust On The Grounds Of Undue Influence, Fraud, And/Or Undue Profit; Tortious Interference With Right To Inherit; Breach Of Fidu
Off Calendar Oct-17-2011 Continued To Jan-23-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jannik Catalano for Respondent. Dawson Crawford for Sylvia Thomason.

Counsel are agreeable to private mediation but some discovery still needs to be conducted. The Petition to Set Aside Trust, etc. was continued to January 23, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Nuque.

Petition To Set Aside Trust On The Grounds Of Undue Influence, Fraud, And/Or Undue Profit; Tortious Interference With Right To Inherit; Breach Of Fidu
Off Calendar Aug-22-2011 Continued To Oct-17-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jannik Catalano for Janice Belen and specially appearing for Attorney Dawson Crawford.

Mr. Catalano stated that Mr. Dawson e mailed him a copy of the amended petition but that he was not sure if it had been filed. The Petition to Set Aside Trust was continued to October 17, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of the amended petition, or a response to the petition or a demurrer/judgment on the pleadings.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

Off Calendar Jun-20-2011 Continued To Aug-22-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jannik Catalano for Janice Belen (Respondent). Dawson Crawford for Sylvia Thomason.

Mr. Catalano stated that he was waiting for a hearing date on his Demurrer. The matter was continued to August 22, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
